creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
On 07/05/13 09:10, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/180312'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=180312
>
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       [maintainer] [patch] [update] sysutils/ansible 1.2.1
>> Arrival-Date:   Fri Jul 05 13:10:00 UTC 2013

Actually, please use this one instead.
Examples get added to pkg-plist automatically, so they are not needed 
again. Also, the .egg-info file is not needed here either.
